caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard wears over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt while speaking in a studio. He is positioned in front of a silver professional microphone attached to a boom arm, which features the text " Rode PSA1". The background consists of grey acoustic foam panels. The man has tattoos on his right arm. Throughout the sequence, he is talking and gesturing with his left hand. Initially, his hand is blurred and moving toward the center of the frame. As the scene progresses, he continues speaking and brings his left hand up, eventually opening his palm and gesturing outward. His facial expressions shift slightly as he speaks, while the camera remains stationary, focusing on his upper body.
